title: pilosella brachiata subsp. valdestriata
intro: Pilosella brachiata subsp. valdestriata, also known as Valeriana pilosella or Mountain Fleabane, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as insomnia, anxiety, and restlessness. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to its health benefits, including its sedative and anti-inflammatory effects. Pilosella brachiata subsp. valdestriata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a variety of uses in traditional medicine.
